overview.title: Connecting continents via air
descriptions: When time defines the outcome, air freight becomes more than speed, it becomes strategy.

DahNAY connects global markets through disciplined, time-sensitive air cargo solutions. From urgent consignments to high-value shipments, we ensure precision in movement, clarity in compliance and visibility at every milestone.
Across continents, across time zones, across critical deadlines, we move with control.

expertise.title: Core and value added services
expertise.content: From planning to delivery, our logistics experts manage every detail with precision. Your cargo moves safely, efficiently, and on time, every time.

expertiseItems.title: Express Air Cargo
expertiseItems.description: Time-definite delivery, Priority handling, Airport-to-airport and door-to-door options

expertiseItems.title: Charter & Part-Charter
expertiseItems.description: Dedicated aircraft for urgent or oversized cargo, Full payload management, On-demand scheduling

expertiseItems.title: Dangerous Goods Handling
expertiseItems.description: IATA DGR-compliant packaging and documentation, Certified handling for all classes, End-to-end compliance management

expertiseItems.title: Multimodal Air Solutions
expertiseItems.description: Air-sea and air-road hybrid routing, Last-mile integration, Cost-optimised transit planning

overview.title: Clear borders.
descriptions: Navigating customs regulations across multiple jurisdictions requires precision and deep regulatory knowledge. DahNAY handles documentation, compliance and clearance so your cargo moves without hold-ups.
From tariff classification to duty management, we ensure every shipment clears smoothly — keeping your trade flowing and your business compliant.

overview.title: Your cargo.
descriptions: From raw materials to finished products, global trade travels by sea. DahNAY enables that movement with discipline, foresight and control.

Across major international trade corridors, we manage high-volume ocean freight with structured planning, regulatory clarity and end-to-end visibility. Whether containerised cargo or complex project shipments, we move scale without losing precision.
Because what moves the world should never be left to chance.

expertise.title: Core and value added services
expertise.content: From planning to delivery, our logistics experts manage every detail with precision. Your cargo moves safely, efficiently, and on time, every time.

expertiseItems.title: Ocean Freight Management
expertiseItems.description: Full Container Load (FCL), Less than Container Load (LCL), Consolidation & Deconsolidation, Break-bulk cargo handling

expertiseItems.title: Specialised Cargo Execution
expertiseItems.description: Oversized and heavy-lift cargo, Open Top and Flat Rack container movements, Reefer (temperature-controlled) shipments, IMDG-compliant hazardous cargo handling

expertiseItems.title: CHA Activities
expertiseItems.description: Export & import documentation, Customs clearance coordination, HS classification support, International trade compliance management

expertiseItems.title: Multimodal & Inland Integration
expertiseItems.description: Port-to-door and door-to-port solutions, Inland haulage coordination, Rail–road–sea multimodal connectivity, Sea–Air hybrid routing during disruptions

expertiseItems.title: RoRo Finished Vehicles
expertiseItems.description: Roll-on/Roll-off vehicle shipping, Finished vehicle logistics, Multi-port distribution, Vessel booking and space management

certifications.title: Certified for
descriptions: DahNAY holds internationally recognised certifications that reflect our commitment to quality, safety and operational integrity across every service we deliver.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.content: Find answers to common questions about our logistics services and how we can support your supply chain.

items.question: What regions do you operate in?
items.answer: DahNAY operates across major international trade corridors spanning Asia, the Middle East, Africa, Europe and the Americas.

items.question: How do I get a quote?
items.answer: Contact our team through the website or email us directly. We provide tailored quotes based on your cargo type, volume and destination.

items.question: Do you handle customs clearance?
items.answer: Yes, we provide end-to-end customs clearance services including documentation, tariff classification and compliance management.

items.question: What types of cargo do you handle?
items.answer: We handle everything from standard containerised cargo to oversized, heavy-lift, hazardous and temperature-controlled shipments.

overview.title: Every minute
descriptions: When downtime costs more than shipping, speed becomes non-negotiable. DahNAY coordinates time-critical deliveries with dedicated routing, priority handling and real-time status updates.
From emergency spare parts to production-line replenishments, we get what you need where it needs to be — fast, tracked and reliable.

expertise.title: Core and value added services
expertise.content: From planning to delivery, our logistics experts manage every detail with precision. Your cargo moves safely, efficiently, and on time, every time.

expertiseItems.title: Emergency Spare Parts
expertiseItems.description: 24/7 dispatch capability, Dedicated courier networks, Airport-to-site direct delivery

expertiseItems.title: Production Line Supply
expertiseItems.description: Just-in-time delivery coordination, Assembly line replenishment, Zero-downtime logistics

expertiseItems.title: On-Board Courier
expertiseItems.description: Hand-carry for critical documents and parts, Next-flight-out booking, Real-time tracking and confirmation

expertiseItems.title: Shutdown & Turnaround
expertiseItems.description: Planned maintenance logistics, Equipment staging and delivery, Multi-vendor coordination
